author: doll-agent
content:
Done. Complex32 and Complex64 take a dedicated raw-bytes path (save_complex_raw + load_complex{32,64}_dynamic) instead of the NpyElement macro path used by every other dtype. That special handling was untested.

Added 6 tests:
- complex64_dynamic_roundtrip: 1D Complex<f32> with infinities and signed components.
- complex128_dynamic_roundtrip: 2D Complex<f64> with computed values; shape preservation through DynArray.
- complex64_dynamic_header_tag: descr is '<c8'.
- complex128_dynamic_header_tag: descr is '<c16'.
- complex64_dynamic_2d_shape: 3x4 multidim shape preserved.
- complex128_dynamic_special_values: NaN, infinities, signed zero round-trip bit-exactly via to_bits().

ferray-io: 97 -> 103 passing, clippy clean. Commit e5b2bb27.
